payload.answer: I’m not sure who “he” refers to or what “the other one” means. Please clarify the person and the item/preference before I can suggest a memory update.
repair_options: Clarify the person: who does “he” refer to?
Clarify the preference target: what are the two options, and which is “the other one”?
Provide the full intended memory as a complete sentence, e.g., “[Name] prefers [specific option].”
If this updates a previous preference, specify the old preference and the new preference so it can be treated as a possible correction or supersession.
